scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix apps/backend" "npm run dev --prefix apps/frontend/apps/admin-app" "npm run dev --prefix apps/frontend/apps/user-app"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/frontend/apps/admin-app && npm run build --prefix apps/frontend/apps/user-app
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix apps/frontend/apps/admin-app && npm run lint --prefix apps/frontend/apps/user-app
